content:
Summary: Adjusted the chat UI layout so the command center message list scrolls independently and the composer stays attached to the bottom without a separator line. The change was made primarily in the CommandCenter component, with a small parent layout tweak in the page to ensure the flex column can shrink correctly.

Facts:
1. [finished] The command center message list is now wrapped in a min-h-0 flex-1 overflow-y-auto container so only the message area scrolls.
2. [finished] The composer area no longer renders a top divider border above the input, removing the separator line between messages and the composer.
3. [finished] The page layout now applies min-h-0 to the chat panel container so the scrollable message region can size correctly inside the full-height split view.

Affected files:
1. [modified] C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\canvas-ai\src\components\CommandCenter.tsx — Contains the message list and composer layout; updated to make the message list scrollable and remove the separator above the composer. | Notes: Added flex sizing and overflow handling to the message list wrapper and removed the composer top border.
2. [modified] C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\canvas-ai\src\app\page.tsx — Provides the chat panel container whose flex sizing must allow the internal scroll area to shrink properly. | Notes: Added min-h-0 to the chat panel wrapper and its sibling split panel wrapper.

metadata.summary: Adjusted the chat UI layout so the command center message list scrolls independently and the composer stays attached to the bottom without a separator line. The change was made primarily in the CommandCenter component, with a small parent layout tweak in the page to ensure the flex column can shrink correctly.

content:
Summary: Implemented a shared workspace settings system so the settings modal now controls real UI behavior across the app. The settings state was lifted to the page and threaded into the sidebar, artifact viewer, command center, and modal. Theme now updates the overall shell and panel styling, density changes spacing, font size adjusts artifact text/table rendering, line numbers can be toggled in the viewer, and auto-scroll can be disabled in the chat panel. The settings modal was also kept as a dedicated overlay component, with the About section removed earlier and the modal now reflecting the shared theme state.

Facts:
1. [finished] Workspace settings are now centralized in src/components/workspaceSettings.ts and shared across the page, sidebar, artifact viewer, command center, and settings modal.
2. [finished] Theme changes now affect the main app shell, mobile header, sidebar, settings modal, artifact viewer, and command center styling.
3. [finished] Density settings now change spacing in the artifact viewer, command center, and modal content layout.
4. [finished] Font size now controls artifact viewer text sizing for both text files and sheet rendering.
5. [finished] Line numbers can now be toggled in the artifact viewer and auto-scroll can be turned on or off in the command center.

Affected files:
1. [modified] src/app/page.tsx — Lifted settings state to the workspace page and passed shared settings into the sidebar, artifact viewer, and command center. | Notes: Also updated the mobile shell to reflect theme changes.
2. [modified] src/components/SettingsModal.tsx — Converted modal controls to receive shared settings state and dispatch updates instead of maintaining isolated local state. | Notes: The modal now reflects the app theme and density state.
3. [modified] src/components/Sidebar.tsx — Sidebar now passes the shared settings state into the modal so theme changes and control updates can affect the whole app. | Notes: The settings button still opens the modal.
4. [modified] src/components/ArtifactViewer.tsx — Artifact rendering now responds to shared line-number, font-size, theme, and density settings. | Notes: Text and sheet rendering both use the shared settings contract.
5. [modified] src/components/CommandCenter.tsx — Chat panel now respects shared theme, density, and auto-scroll settings. | Notes: Auto-scroll can be toggled off from the modal.
6. [created] src/components/workspaceSettings.ts — Introduced a shared typed settings contract to avoid duplicating setting shapes and to keep state updates explicit. | Notes: Defines the default workspace settings and updater type.

metadata.summary: Implemented a shared workspace settings system so the settings modal now controls real UI behavior across the app. The settings state was lifted to the page and threaded into the sidebar, artifact viewer, command center, and modal. Theme now updates the overall shell and panel styling, density changes spacing, font size adjusts artifact text/table rendering, line numbers can be toggled in the viewer, and auto-scroll can be disabled in the chat panel. The settings modal was also kept as a dedicated overlay component, with the About section removed earlier and the modal now reflecting the shared theme state.
